name: reachability-advisor-vscode
description: Runs Reachability Advisor and displays dependency vulnerability diagnostics.

reachabilityAdvisor.sbom.description: CycloneDX SBOM path relative to the workspace root.

reachabilityAdvisor.vulns.description: Vulnerability intelligence JSON path relative to the workspace root.

reachabilityAdvisor.context.description: Optional context JSON path relative to the workspace root.

reachabilityAdvisor.sourceRootArtifact.description: Artifact name used for artifact=workspace source-root mapping.
